highlights.text: My general lean is we can re-test 5610.
I wrote yesterday that: “Bear case tomorrow: No bear case until we are sub 5720 below the gap fill.
Rallies begin with my core setup: The Failed Breakdown.
I wrote on March 13th: “ We have an active Failed Breakdown.
However, while Failed Breakdowns start rallies, in order to sustain and propel them , ES needs to recover a major prior breakdown zone and on Sunday/early Monday, it just did that.

post_title: Decision Time For SPX: Will Today's Dip Get Bought? March 27 Plan
